content.text:
Address the hugo warnings when the site is built:

2026-07-02T20:54:34.418305Z    WARN  deprecated: project config key languageCode was deprecated in Hugo v0.158.0 and will be removed in a future release. Use locale instead.
2026-07-02T20:54:34.450147Z    WARN  deprecated: .Site.LanguageCode was deprecated in Hugo v0.158.0 and will be removed in a future release. Use .Site.Language.Locale instead.
This is a small, direct fix — no need for brainstorming or planning skills. Let me check the config.

content.text: Two fixes needed: rename `languageCode` → `locale` in `config.toml`, and update the theme template using `.Site.LanguageCode`.

content.text: Both deprecation warnings are gone and the build is clean. Let's verify `lang="en-gb"` still renders correctly in the output.

Confirmed — `lang="en-gb"` is preserved. Changes:

- `config.toml:2` — `languageCode` → `locale`
- `themes/portio/layouts/_default/baseof.html:2` — `site.LanguageCode` → `site.Language.Locale`

Build is clean, no warnings, output unchanged. Uncommitted — let me know if you'd like this committed.
open a PR, then squash and merge it
We're on `main` with uncommitted changes — I'll create a branch, commit, push, open the PR, then squash-merge it.

input.command:
git add config.toml themes/portio/layouts/_default/baseof.html && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix Hugo 0.158 deprecation warnings for languageCode/LanguageCode

Hugo deprecated the languageCode config key and .Site.LanguageCode in
favour of locale and .Site.Language.Locale respectively.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Fix Hugo deprecation warnings for languageCode" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Renamed `languageCode` to `locale` in `config.toml` (Hugo deprecated `languageCode` in v0.158.0)
- Updated `themes/portio/layouts/_default/baseof.html` to use `.Site.Language.Locale` instead of the deprecated `.Site.LanguageCode`

## Test plan
- [x] `rm -rf public resources/_gen .hugo_build.lock && hugo` builds with no deprecation warnings
- [x] Confirmed `<html lang="en-gb">` renders unchanged in `public/index.html`
EOF
)"

content.text: PR #19 opened. Now squash-merging (self-approval always fails on this repo, so skipping straight to merge per project notes).

content.text: PR #19 merged and squashed into `main`, branch deleted. Let's sync local `main` and clean up.

input.command: git checkout main && git pull --ff-only && git branch -d chore/fix-hugo-deprecation-warnings 2>&1

content.text: All done — `main` was already fast-forwarded to the merge (`22bbe2b`), and the local feature branch had already been cleaned up. Both Hugo deprecation warnings are fixed and shipped.
